Bash(/opt/anaconda3/bin/python -c "
from targeted_fas_minor import FASMinorCalculator
from determinant_computer import DeterminantComputer

calc = FASMinorCalculator.from_characteristic_tuples\([\(3,1,5\),\(3,1,4\)]\)
det_comp = DeterminantComputer\(calc\)

print\('Base rows:', det_comp.get_base_rows\(\)\)
print\(\)

g0 = calc.graphs[0]
print\('Comp 0 vertices:', g0.vertices\)
print\('Comp 0 edges:', g0.edges\)
print\('Comp 0 vertex_depths:', g0.vertex_depths\)
print\(\)

g1 = calc.graphs[1]
print\('Comp 1 vertices:', g1.vertices\)
print\('Comp 1 edges:', g1.edges\)
print\('Comp 1 vertex_depths:', g1.vertex_depths\)
print\(\)

p_spec = det_comp.base_A_root_product_spec\(\)
print\('p_spec keys:', list\(p_spec.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)
print\('Extra row \(0,1,2\) in base rows?', \(0,1,2\) in det_comp.get_base_rows\(\)\)
")
